ConnectionStrings._comment: Leave DraftRoom blank to run the in-memory foundation (used by a fresh clone and the hermetic tests). Supply a PostgreSQL connection string via gitignored appsettings.Development.json or the ConnectionStrings__DraftRoom environment variable to enable EF Core persistence.

Brevo._comment: Secrets are supplied via gitignored appsettings.Development.json or Brevo__* environment variables. Leaving ApiKey/SenderEmail blank here reports EmailConfigured=false until configured.
